## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in on client progress and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Udemy Pipeline Optimized:** Jen's edits reduced manual editing, shifting focus from re-drafting to research. A new webinar artifact will be built to deepen content context.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**Understory Content Expansion:** A new "Reddit article" pipeline will launch in March, followed by "mini case studies" repurposed from video testimonials to fill a content gap.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [**Proactive Coverage Required:** Simran must proactively arrange backup for a March 9–11 absence, per Panzer's mandate, to prevent last-minute scrambling for support.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Operating Manuals Are Living Docs:** All team members must keep their client operating manuals updated with new pipelines and processes to ensure a smooth handover during Katya's maternity leave.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)

## Topics

### Udemy: Pipeline Optimization & New Artifacts

  - [**Pipeline Impact:** Jen's edits improved the pipeline's quality, shifting Simran's focus from manual re-drafting to research and source verification.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**New Artifact → Webinars:**](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a webinar artifact to provide deeper content context for Atlas, similar to the case study artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [**Source:** Udemy's 51 webinars.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Action:** Simran to analyze webinar titles via Claude to identify relevant topics (e.g., L\&D) and create a targeted list for Katya to request transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Access Note:** The `thanks` UTM trick for gated content is currently broken for webinars.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### Understory: Content Expansion & Timeline

  - [**New Pipeline → Reddit Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Goal:** Generate short (500–700 words) Reddit-style articles with a blog link to drive traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Status:** Engineering ticket filed (assignee: Leo).](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Launch first week of March for calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [**New Pipeline → Mini Case Studies:**](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [**Goal:** Repurpose client video testimonials into blog case studies to fill a content gap.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Research in March, launch mid-March.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Content Calendar:**](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [**Status:** Backlog is empty after the next three weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [**Action:** Simran to conduct keyword research to fill the calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [**Process:** Katya shares topics for a 1-week review; execution proceeds unless feedback is given.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)

### Team Operations: Coverage & Documentation

  - [**Absence Coverage (Simran: March 9–11):**](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
      - [**Mandate:** Proactively arrange backup for potential feedback implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents last-minute scrambling and aligns with Panzer's directive.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Operating Manuals:**](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Serve as living documents for smooth client handovers.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)
      - [**Action:** All team members must keep their sections updated with new pipelines and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/wCMUssUKjCaydK_ubmWGLATS5f4gDjpX?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)
